'''nagoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draftswomanship|draftswomanship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-g-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draftswomanship|draftswomanship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nagoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nægeheth|nægeheth]] || [[word:nægehej|nægehej]] || [[word:nægehesh|nægehesh]] || [[word:nægehe|nægehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nagogohoth|nagogohoth]] || [[word:nagogohoj|nagogohoj]] || [[word:nagogohosh|nagogohosh]] || [[word:nagogoho|nagogoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nagohoth|nagohoth]] || [[word:nagohoj|nagohoj]] || [[word:nagohosh|nagohosh]] || [[word:nagoho|nagoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nagofhoth|nagofhoth]] || [[word:nagofhoj|nagofhoj]] || [[word:nagofhosh|nagofhosh]] || [[word:nagofhof|nagofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nagohotho|nagohotho]] || [[word:nagohojo|nagohojo]] || [[word:nagohosho|nagohosho]] || [[word:nagohoko|nagohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nagohoth|nagohoth]] || [[word:nagohoj|nagohoj]] || [[word:nagohosh|nagohosh]] || [[word:nagoho|nagoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nagohothol|nagohothol]] || [[word:nagohojol|nagohojol]] || [[word:nagohoshol|nagohoshol]] || [[word:nagohokol|nagohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nagohothotho|nagohothotho]] || [[word:nagohojojo|nagohojojo]] || [[word:nagohoshosho|nagohoshosho]] || [[word:nagohoko|nagohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nagohothon|nagohothon]] || [[word:nagohojon|nagohojon]] || [[word:nagohoshon|nagohoshon]] || [[word:nagohokon|nagohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nagohothoro|nagohothoro]] || [[word:nagohojoro|nagohojoro]] || [[word:nagohoshoro|nagohoshoro]] || [[word:nagohokoro|nagohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
